info.title: CRM API Documentation
info.description: REST API for managing leads, customers, notes, tasks, activities, and dashboard statistics. Authentication uses JWT bearer tokens obtained via the login or register endpoints.

get.description: Returns a paginated audit log of activities, latest first. Restricted to admins and sales managers.

post.description: Creates a new user account with an optional self-selectable role (sales-manager or sales-executive, defaulting to sales-executive) and returns a freshly issued JWT access token. Rate limited to 5 requests per minute.
Validates the given credentials and returns a freshly issued JWT access token. Rate limited to 5 requests per minute.
Exchanges the JWT access token supplied in the Authorization header for a newly issued one.

401.description: Token is missing, invalid, or expired.

post.description: Invalidates the JWT access token supplied in the Authorization header.

401.description: Token is missing, invalid, or expired.

get.description: Returns the user associated with the current JWT access token, including their role.

401.description: Token is missing, invalid, or expired.

post.summary: Convert a lead into a customer
post.description: Creates a customer record from an existing lead. Restricted to admins and sales managers.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of customers. Restricted to admins and sales managers.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search across customer name, company, email, or phone.

get.description: Returns a single customer with its related lead and notes. Restricted to admins and sales managers.

Returns aggregated statistics for the CRM dashboard: lead and customer totals, today's follow-ups, overdue tasks, lead breakdown by status, and the conversion rate. Accessible to admins, sales managers, and sales executives.
Returns a paginated, filterable list of leads. Accessible to admins, sales managers, and sales executives.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search across lead name, email, or company.

post.description: Creates a new lead. Accessible to admins, sales managers, and sales executives.

get.description: Returns a single lead with its assigned user and creator. Accessible to admins, sales managers, and sales executives.

put.description: Updates an existing lead. Accessible to admins, sales managers, and sales executives.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a lead. Restricted to admins and sales managers.

patch.description: Assigns a lead to a user, or unassigns it when null. Restricted to admins and sales managers.
Updates the status of a lead. Accessible to admins, sales managers, and sales executives.

get.description: Returns all notes attached to the given customer. Restricted to admins and sales managers.

200.description: A list of notes for the customer.

post.summary: Add a note to a customer
post.description: Creates a new note for the given customer, recorded against the authenticated user. Restricted to admins and sales managers.

note.example: Called to follow up on the proposal.

get.description: Searches leads, customers, and tasks for a free-text query and returns the top matches grouped by type. Customers are only included for admins and sales managers.
Returns a paginated, filterable list of tasks. Accessible to admins, sales managers, and sales executives.

post.description: Creates a new task. A task must belong to either a lead or a customer. Accessible to admins, sales managers, and sales executives.

get.description: Returns a single task. Accessible to admins, sales managers, and sales executives.

put.description: Updates an existing task. Accessible to admins, sales managers, and sales executives.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a task. Accessible to admins, sales managers, and sales executives.

get.description: Returns a lightweight, searchable list of users (id and name only), used to populate assignment comboboxes.

AuthTokenResponse.description: The JWT access token is set as an HttpOnly cookie and is not present in the response body.

note.example: Called to follow up on the proposal.

bearerAuth.description: Enter the JWT access token obtained from the login or register endpoint, e.g. "Bearer {token}".

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User registration, login, token refresh, logout, and current-user endpoints.

tags.name: Leads
tags.description: CRUD and workflow operations for sales leads.

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: Customer records, created by converting leads.

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Follow-up tasks linked to leads or customers.

tags.name: Activities
tags.description: Audit log of actions performed across the system.

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Aggregated statistics for the CRM dashboard.
